title: Ascidieria pseudocymbiformis
taxonomy: Ascidieria pseudocymbiformis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Ascidieria, which is a small group of orchids found in the Pacific Islands. The species is native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands and is known for its unique flowers. Further classification of Ascidieria pseudocymbiformis includes the kingdom Plantae, the division Magnoliophyta, and the class Liliopsida. The species is also sometimes referred to as a synonym of Ascidieria cymbiformis.
